title: PHED Minister Prof. Lalnilawma'n Lunglei khawpui tui lakna Pialthleng leh Tlawng lui tlawhin, GLWSS tihchangtlun hna thawh mek a enfiah
content:
506/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Ṭomir thla ni 13: Mizoram sawrkara Public Health Engineering Department (PHED) Minister Prof. Lalnilawma chuan vawiin khan Lunglei khawpui tui lakna, Greater Lunglei Water Supply Scheme (GLWSS) hmun Pialthleng leh Tlawng lui tlawhin, Lunglei khawpuiin tui hnianghnar zawk a hmuh theih nana AMRUT 2.0 leh SASCI hnuaia GLWSS tihchangtlun hna thawh mek a enfiah.

Minister hi RD&AD Additional Secretary Pu V. Lalengmawia, LAD Director Dr Lalngura Tlau leh official dangte'n ṭawiawmin, PHED Lunglei Circle-a Superintending Engineer Er Lalsanga hovin PHED official-te'n an lo dawngsawng a. GLWSS tihchangtlun hna thawh mekte thlir hovin, hna thawh zel dan tur ruahmanna leh hmachhawpte an sawi ho.

PHED Minister Prof. Lalnilawma chuan Lunglei khawpui chawmtu tui lakna tur Tlawng lui khuah hna zawh fel thawkhat a ni ta chu lawmawm a tih thu leh he tuikhuah hmang hian Lunglei khawpuiin tui lama harsatna a tawh ṭhin tam tak chu sut kian a nih tur thu sawiin, PHED-a thawktute leh hna thawktu contractor-te chungah leh hna thawh laia hre thiam taka dawh hram hram ṭhintu Lunglei mipuite chungah lawm thu a sawi a. Hetih rual hian tui semna hmanrua leh a dah khawlna lam duh anga inpeih fel a la nih loh avanga mipuite beisei anga tui hnianghnar zawka sem theih a la ni lo chu pawi a tih thu sawiin, mipuite'n hnianghnar zawka tui an hmuh theih nan hmachhawp hrang hrang a awm thu leh chak zawka hma lak chhoh zel a nih tur thu a sawi.

GLWSS tui lakna Tlawng luia tuikhuah (Gravity Concrete Impounding Dam) siam hna hi cheng vaibelchhe 4.7 sengin HS Construction Pvt Ltd, Aizawl te'n thawkin, tuikhuah hi metre 13-a sang a ni a. A hnar lamah kilometre 1.5-a thui chimin, tui luan liamna Spillway ṭha taka siam a ni a. Spillway an siam dan hi a chhuanawm hle niin PHED hotute pawhin an sawi. Tuikhuahna chungah hian lei (bridge) mawihnai taka siam turin hma lak leh mek a ni a. Tui hi a khuahnaah a tling khat a nih chuan litre maktaduai 240 million tling thei tura chhut a ni.

Tuna Lunglei tui pump mekna – Greater Lunglei Water Supply Scheme hi November ni 22, 1995-ah hman ṭan niin, tunah hian kum 30 chuanga upa a ni tawh a. Lunglei tui lakna, GLWSS tihchangtlunna tur hian ṭhuang hnihin hma lak mek a ni a. Kum 2054 (kum 30 hnu) thlenga mihring 1,11,827 chawm thei tur, Tlawng leh Pialthleng lui aṭanga tui lakna tur ruahmanna, "Upgradation of GLWSS (Pumping & Distribution System) chu SASCI (Scheme for Special Assistance to States for Capital Investment) 2024–2025 sum cheng vaibelchhe 55.7 (₹ 55,70,00,000/-) sengin hma lak mek a ni a. AMRUT (Atal Mission for Rejuvenation and Urban Transformation) 2.0 hnuaiah sum cheng vaibelchhe 9.9778 sengin "Improvement of Water Sources and Extension of Distribution System for Greater Lunglei Water Supply Scheme" hna thawh mek ni bawkin, Tlawng lui khuah hna hi he project hnuaiah hian thawh a ni.

title: MISSION GINGER USP CULTIVATION & VALUE CHAIN DEVELOPMENT PROJECT INAUGURATED
content:
75/2026-2027

Aizawl, 13 May 2026:The Mizoram Ginger Unique Selling Proposition (USP) – Sustainable Cultivation & Value Chain Development Project, to be implemented under the Ministry of Development of North Eastern Region (DoNER) with an outlay of Rs. 189.78 crore, was inaugurated today through an online programme by Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma and Union Minister for DoNER, Shri Jyotiraditya Scindia.

The inauguration programme was held at the Chief Minister’s Office under the chairmanship of Chief Minister Shri Lalduhoma. It was attended by Shri C. Lalsawivunga, Minister for Horticulture; Dr. K.C. Lalmalsawmzauva, Adviser to the Chief Minister; Shri Khilli Ram Meena, Chief Secretary; and senior officials of the Government of Mizoram. Shri Jyotiraditya Scindia joined virtually from New Delhi, while officials from the Ministry of DoNER and ginger farmers from Champhai district also participated online.

Speaking on the occasion, the Chief Minister stated that the Ministry of DoNER had recognized Mizoram ginger as a Unique Selling Proposition (USP). In recognition of this distinction, the Ministry has approved the Rs. 189.78 crore project for sustainable cultivation and value chain development. The project will focus on Sustainable Cultivation, Quality Control & Food Safety, Farm Mechanization & Solarisation, and Post-Harvest Management & Processing. Other components will be implemented in convergence with schemes of various Ministries. The Post-Harvest Management & Processing component, in particular, will receive Gap Funding support from the NEC’s Focused Development Component (FDC).

The Chief Minister further highlighted that ginger has been cultivated by the Mizos since ancient times and continues to be one of the most widely grown cash crops in the state. Mizoram ginger is known for its superior quality, distinctive aroma, medicinal value, low fibre content, and rich oleoresin and essential oil content. Among the three main varieties cultivated in Mizoram, Thingpui and Thinglaidum received the Geographical Indication (GI) Tag in 2021. In 2025, chemical residue testing conducted by Eurofins Analytical Services, Bengaluru, confirmed that Mizoram ginger successfully met quality standards. He added that the recent recognition as a Unique Selling Proposition further strengthens the crop’s potential and identity.

Union Minister Shri Jyotiraditya Scindia, in his address, said that strengthening farmers’ collective participation and livelihoods is one of the key priorities of the Prime Minister of India. As farmers’ development is central to the nation’s progress, the Government has been undertaking various initiatives to empower them. He stated that this project would be implemented in collaboration with different Ministries, farmers, societies, and the State Government, and that the unique and high-quality ginger of Mizoram would now be promoted more widely.

The project will be implemented in convergence with various departmental schemes. Sustainable Cultivation and Farm Mechanization components will be carried out in coordination with the Agriculture, Horticulture, and Rural Development Departments. The Processing component will be implemented with NEC Focused Development Component (FDC) funding amounting to Rs. 30.13 crore.

Regarding the processing unit, a major Processing Hub (Main Hub) will be established at Mualkawi in Champhai district, which is the highest ginger-producing district in Mizoram. Supporting smaller Spoke Hubs will be set up at Tualcheng, Vaphai, and Zotlang. The Main Hub is proposed to be managed by larger investors, while the three smaller units are planned to be operated by local societies.

The infrastructure works are targeted for completion within this year, with ginger processing activities expected to commence from next year onward.

The programme concluded with a vote of thanks delivered by Chief Secretary Pu Khilli Ram Meena.

title: MISSION GINGER USP CULTIVATION & VALUE CHAIN DEVELOPMENT PROJECT HAWNG
content:
505/2026-2027

Aizawl the 13th May 2026:Vawiin khan Ministry of DoNER hnuaia Rs. 189. 78 Crore senga kalpui tur Mizoram Ginger Unique Selling Proposition (USP) –  Sustainable Cultivation & Value Chain Development Project chu Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma leh DoNER Minister Pu Jyotiraditya Scindia ten online-in an hawng.

A hawnna hi Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma hovin a office-ah Pu C. Lalsawivunga, Horticulture Minister, Dr. KC Lalmalsawmzauva, Adviser to CM, Pu Khilli Ram Meena, Chief Secretary leh Mizoram sorkar officials ten an hmang a. Pu Jyotiraditya Scindia hian Delhi atangin a zawm a, Ministry of DoNER offcials te leh Champhaia sawhthing chingtute pawhin online-in an zawm ve bawk.

Thusawiin Chief Minister chuan, Mizoram sawhthing chu Unique Selling Proposition atan Ministry of DoNER in a pawm a. USP a nih tak avangin Rs. 189. 78 Crore senga kalpui turin he project hi min rawn phalsak ta a ni. Sustainable Cultivation atan te, Quality control & Food Safety atan te, Farm Mechanization & Solarisation atan te leh Post Harvest Management & Processing atan te hman a ni ang.

Component dangte hi Ministry dang scheme te nena thawkho (convergence) a hmalak tur a ni a. Post Harvest Management & Processing bik hi NEC (FDC) atangin Gap Funding min pe dawn a ni.

Sawhthing chu hmanlai atanga kan pi leh pute lo chin tawh thin thlai, vawiin thlenga Cash Crop kan chin uar ber zinga mi, Mizote nuna bet tlat a ni a. A quality a tha bik a, a rim a tui a, medicinal value a nei a, a fibre neih a tlem a, oleoresin leh essential oil a ngah a. A danglam bik a ni. Mizoten sawhthing chi thum kan chin thin zinga Thingpui leh Thinglaidumte chuan kum 2021 khan GI Tag a hmu a, kum 2025 khan chemicals residue endikna Eurofin Analytical Services, Bengaluru lamin an neih chu tha takin a paltlang tawh a. Tun hnaiah Unique Selling Proposition atan thlan a lo ni leh ta a ni, a ti.

Pu Jyotiraditya Scindia pawhin thusawiin, India ram puma loneitute inthlunzawma hnathawh hi Prime Minister hmathlir pawimawh tak a ni a. Loneitute tihhmasawn hi India hmasawnna ke chheh pawimawh a nih avangin anni chawikang tur hian kawng hrang hrangin sorkar chuan hma a la a. He project pawh hi Ministry dangte nena tangrualin, loneitute leh society te, state sorkarte nena tangkawpin kan kalpui dawn a. Mizoram sawhthing, tha danglam tak hi zau zawkin kan pho chhuak dawn a ni, a ti.

Project hi scheme dangte nena convergence-a kalpui tur a ni a. Sustainable Cultivation leh Farm Mechanization te hi Agriculture Department, Horticulture leh Rural Development Department te nena kalpui tur niin; a processing bik hi chu NEC Fund (Focused Development Component) atanga sum hmuh Rs. 30.13 Crore hmanga kalpui a ni ang.

Ruahman dan chuan Mizorama sawhthing thar tam ber District, Champhai District-a Mualkawiah Pilot Project angin a processing Hub bulpui ber (Main Hub) din a ni ang a, chumi chawmtu turin a chhehvelah unit tenau deuh zawk (Spoke Hub) Tualcheng, Vaphai leh Zotlangah dah an ni ang. Main Hub hi investor lian zawkte enkawltir a, a tenau pathumte hi Society enkawltir tura ruahman a ni.

Hna hi kumin chhunga thawh zawh hman a, nakkum atanga processing kalpui theih tum a ni.

Project hawnna hi Pu Khilli Ram Meena, Chief Secretary chuan lawmthu sawiin a khar a ni.

title: Lunglei Serkawnah 40 Days Healthy Lunglei Campaign hnuaiah hriselna chungchang inzirtirna leh hriselna dinhmun endikna buatsaih a ni
content:
502/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Ṭomir thla ni 13:Nizan khan Sikulpui Hall, Serkawn, Lungleiah 40 Days Healthy Lunglei Campaign hun hman niin, hriselna chungchang leh LushAI Healthy Lunglei App chungchang inzirtir a nih bakah, a thlawnin kal khawmte hriselna dinhmun endiksak an ni.

YMA Serkawn Branch President Pu P. Lalrimawia'n hun kaihruaiin, Lunglei Sub-Deputy Commissioner Pu Benjamin Lalrinawma'n 40 Days Healthy Lunglei Campaign chungchang a sawi zau va. Hriselna kaihhnawiha tih tur leh tih loh turte ṭha taka zawm tur leh LushAI Healthy Lunglei App chu hman ṭangkai tum ṭheuh turin kal khawmte a chah.

Urban Primary Health Centre (UPHC) Hrangchalkawna Medical Officer Dr VL Hrechianga chuan natna inkai chhawn theih loh (non-communicable disease) chungchang te, NCD laka inven dan leh nunphung hrisel neih pawimawhna te, hriselna atana tih tur leh tih loh tur hrang hrangte a zirtir a. Data Entry Operator Pu K. Hmingthanmawia'n LushAI Healthy Lunglei App chungchang sawi fiahin, application hman dan a takin a zirtir a. Kal khawmte'n a hmunah LushAI Healthy Lunglei App chu an mobile phone-ah an dah lut (install) nghal bawk.

He hunah hian YMA member leh khawtlang mipui mi 60 chuang an tel a. Medical Team te'n health screening buatsaih chhunzawmin, mi 60 te hriselna dinhmun endik a ni.

40 Days Healthy Lunglei Campaign kalpui chhung hian YMA branch hrang hrang leh college-ah te hriselna dinhmun endikna (health screening) te, hriselna leh LHL App chungchang inzirtirna leh intihsiakna te buatsaih ṭhin a ni dawn a. Ni 40 chhunga campaign zawh hnuah App download tam leh hmang ṭhate hnenah lawmman siam tum a ni bawk.

LushAI Healthy Lunglei app hmang hian district chhunga sawrkar damdawi in leh health centre-a daktawrte ṭhut hun tur a en theih bakah, OPD-a inentir turin appointment a lak lawk (book) theih a. ABHA-a inziah luhna te, he app-a inziak lut damdawi dawr (pharmacy)-te aṭanga damdawi chah theihna te awmin, hriselna lama hriat tur pawimawh hrang hrangte pawh awlsam takin a hmuh theih a. OPD appointment laknaa pui thei tur leh zawhna hrang hrang Mizo ṭawnga chhang thei tur AI chatbot dah tel a ni bawk a. Android hmangte tanhttps://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.lushaihealthylunglei.androidaṭangin leh iOS hmangte tanhttps://apps.apple.com/in/app/lhl/id6755673586aṭangin download theih a ni.

title: AH&VETY MINISTER-IN CONFERENCE HMANPUI
content:
501/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl the 13th May, 2026 :Vawiin chawhma khan AH&Vety Minister Pu C.Lalsawivunga chuan AH&Vety Rest House Selesihah Mizoram Veterinary Service Association Annual General Conference vawi 44 na chu khuallian niin a hmanpui a. AH & Vety Secretary Pu Lalsangliana chu khual zahawm a ni.

Minister chuan thusawiin  AH&Vety Department chu Mizoram economy innghahna bulpui a ni a, “sorkar hmalakna tihlawhtling turin thahnemngai takin mahni zawn theuhah hna i thawk ang u”, tiin member te a fuih. Artuia intodelh tura hmalakna Mega Egg production project Thenzawlah kalpui mek chungchang sawiin Minister chuan he project hi arpui nuaikhat leh artui 70,000 thla tin thar chhuahna tur a ni, a ti. “ASF avanga kan vawk vulh te nasa taka kan chan hnuah National Livestock Mission hnuaiah Animal Insurance chu ni 10 February khan kalpui tan a ni a,he insurance hi India ramah pawh a nei tha ber kan ni a ranvulh tute pawh an lawm hle a ni”, Minister chuan a ti a. Ranvulh tuten an ran te an insure ngei na turin Department a hnathawk tute hma lakpui turin a chah a. Ran chaw lak tur te a van tawh avangin nasa takin bawng population a tlahniam a, hemi lamah hian tan la in Department chuan ranchaw fodder nasa taka ching turin hma a la mek, tih a sawi a. Mizoram hmun hrang hrangah ram te en mek niin, ranvulh tute an ina kal chilh a, an harsatna te sut kian pui thin turin member kalkhawm te Pu C Lalsawivunga chuan a sawm a. Mahni zawnah rinawm leh thahnemngai taka thawk turin a fuih bawk.

He hun hi an President Dr Robert Rualthankhuma chuan a kaihruaia, Dr Lalrotluanga Sailo Director hnen atangin inlawmna thu ngaihthlak a ni. Secretary report Dr V.Lalzarzova'n a pe a ni.

MVSA member Dr Malsawmtluangi Ralte chuan Best PhD thesis Award a dawn avangin lawmpuina hlan a ni a,Dr Rosangzuala Vice President in lawmthu sawina in chawhma hun a khar.

Vice President Dr TC Lalthanzauva chuan chawhnu hun a hruai a. Finance report, Awareness program,Annual conference rorel bakah member pension tur thlahna hun hman a ni.

MVSA hi 15th October 1975-ah Mizoram Veterinary Association (MVA) ti a din a ni a, tunah hian AH & Vety Department-ah MAH&VS post 115 awmah thawklai 73 an awm mek a ni.

title: Mizoram Governor Attends SDGI Global University’s First Convocation as Chief Guest
content:
74/2026-2027

Aizawl, the 13th May, 2026:Mizoram Governor, General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh, PVSM, AVSM, YSM (Retd), graced the First Convocation of SDGI Global University, Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, as Chief Guest yesterday. Prof. K.K. Aggarwal, President of South Asian University, attended the event as Guest of Honour.

In his convocation address, the Mizoram Governor General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh congratulated SDGI Global University on successfully organising its inaugural convocation, describing it as a historic and noteworthy milestone. He urged the university not only to sustain its momentum but to continue progressing with greater excellence. He encouraged the graduating students, noting that having built a strong foundation, they should face the future with confidence wherever they go. The Governor advised the graduates to uphold the values of perseverance, discipline, hard work, patience and to always think big. He called upon them to confront future challenges with positive thinking and unwavering determination. He also urged parents to remain consistently supportive of their children’s aspirations so that they may achieve greater success in life.

SDGI Global University, Ghaziabad, was established on 14 July 2023 under the Uttar Pradesh Private University Act, 2019. The University is managed by the Sundar Deep Educational Society, which has been contributing to higher education in the state for the past 20 years. The Society runs institutions in diverse fields including Engineering, Pharmacy, Architecture, Hotel Management, Law, Education, Commerce, Management, Polytechnic and others, with around 5500 students currently enrolled.

Prof. (Dr.) Parsanjeet Kumar, Vice Chancellor of the University, delivered the welcome address. The event was also attended by Mr. Mahender Aggarwal, Chancellor of SDGI Global University, members of the University Governing Body and parents of the graduates.

title: Mizoram Larsap-in SDGI Global University Convocation hmasa ber a hmanpui
content:
498/2026-2027

Aizawl, the 13th May, 2026:Mizoram Larsap, General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh, PVSM, AVSM, YSM (Retd) chuan nimin khan SDGI Global University, Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, Convocation hmasa ber chu Khuallian niin a hmanpui. Prof. K.K. Aggarwal, President of South Asian University chu Khualzahawm a ni.

He huna thu a sawinaah Larsap General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh chuan SDGI Global University-in Convocation hmasa ber a thleng thei chu lawmawm a tih thu leh chhinchhiah tlak a tih thu sawiin, bul an tan tawhna chu tawpsan mai lova chhawmnung zel turin a fuih a. Convocation hmasa ber hmangtu zirlaite chu dinna nghet tak nei an nih tawh avangin hmun danga an kal darh hunah pawh inrintawkna nei turin a chah a. Beih hram hramna, inthununna, taimakna leh dawhtheihna neia tum sang tak nei tur leh, a eng zawnga thil thlira an hma zawna chona awmte beiseina nena hmachhawn zel turin a fuih a. Zirlai nu leh pate chu an fate an tuina zawnah kal tir tur leh an hlawhtlin ngei theih nana tawiawm tlat thin turin a chah bawk.

SDGI Global University, Ghaziabad hi Uttar Pradesh Private University Act, 2019 hnuaiah July ni 14, 2023 khan din niin, Sundar Deep Educational Society-in a enkawl a. Uttar Pradesh-ah zirna sang zawk tihhmasawn nan kum 20 dawn an thawk tawh a; Engineering, Pharmacy, Architecture, Hotel Management, Law, Education, Commerce, Management, Polytechnic leh adangahte zirna kalpuiin zirlai 5,500 dawn SDGI University hian a nei mek a ni.

Prof. (Dr.) Parsanjeet Kumar, Vice Chancellor chuan kalkhawmte lawmna thu a sawi a. Khualzahawm Prof. K.K. Aggarwal, President of South Asian University leh Pu Mahender Aggarwal, Chancellor, SDGI Global University-te hnen atangin thusawi ngaihthlak a ni.

He hunah hian SDGI Global University Governing Body member, zirtirtu, zirlai leh nu leh pate an tel a ni.

title: 'MISSION URBAN DRAIN' TLANGZARH A NI
content:
495/2026-2027

Aizawl, 13 May 2026:Vawiin khan Planning & Programme Implementation Department Conference Hall-ah UD&PA Minister Pu K. Sapdanga’n UD&PA hmalakna thar ‘Mission Urban Drain' a tlangzarh. He mission thil tum ber chu Aizawl khawpui hriselna, thianghlimna leh himna tura tui luan kawr ( Drain) mumal zawk siam a ni.

Tlangzarhna inkhawmah hian Pu K. Sapdanga chuan Aizawl khawpui chu tlang chhengchhe taka awm a nihavangin kumtin leimin leh leitawlh kan tuar nasa thin a, hei hi tui luankawr mumal kan neih loh vang a ni, a ti a. "Kan drain neihchhunte hi hmun tam takah bawlhhlawhin a hnawh a, ruahtui a tlak hmasaka tuihawk lo luangliam hian khawlai a tibawlhhlawh thin bawk a ni," a ti.

Minister chuan Mission Urban Drain-in a tum ber chu khawpui himna, thianghlimna leh hriselna a ni a, hemi tihhlawhtlinna atan hian kum 7 chhunga Aizawl khawpui tuam chhuak vek tui luan kawr mumal tak siam tum a nih thu a sawi.He mission hlawhtlinna tur hian UD&PA, DM&R, AMC Corporators-te inkarah thawhhona tha tak a awm a pawimawh thu a sawi a. Minister chuan Local Council, tlawmngai pawl leh mipuite chu mahni veng theuhva tui luan kawr vawng thianghlim tur leh he hna hi kuttling lova thawk lo turin a chah a ni.

Pu Jacob Lalawmpuia, Director,UD&PA chuan Mission Urban Drain hmalakna tur te a sawifiah a,chungte chu:

1) Tui Luan Kawr Thlunzawmna: Khawpui chhunga tui luan kawr awm tawh sa, hmun hrang hranga thlun zawm loh (missing links) mumal taka thlun zawm vek tura ruahman a ni.

2) Three-Tier Classification: Tui luan kawrte hi chi thumah then an ni a—Primary (Storm Drain lian), Secondary (Ward-level link drains), leh Tertiary (In bulhnaia tui luan kawr tenau) te a ni.

3) RCC-a siam leh Footpath: Tui luan kawr thar siam turte hi RCC-a siam tur niin, a remchanna hmun apiangah RCC-a khuh (cover) a ni ang a, hei hian mihring kalna (pedestrian footpath) tha tak a siam dawn bakah chetsualna lakah a veng dawn a ni.

4) Scientific Planning : GIS-based mapping hmangin Aizawl khawpui hmun hrang hranga tui luanna turte uluk taka zirchian (survey) hnuah hna hi thawh a ni ang.

Mission Urban Drain hi kum 2033 a zawhfel tura inruahman phawt a ni a, khawpui chhunga tui luan kawr zawng zawngte mumal taka kawrpuia luan luh tuir vek tum niin, SASCI hnuaiah cheng vaibelchhe 61.76 hmangin hmun 26 ah tui luan kawr siam hna thawh mek a ni a, cheng vaibelchhe 35 dang dilna tur DPR buatsaih mek a ni bawk.

Pu V. Lalruatliana, Dy.CEO, Aizawl Smart City Ltd. pawhin ‘Solid Waste Management Rules, 2026’ chungchang presentation hmangin a hrilhfiah a. He dan thar hian Solid Waste Management Rules 2016 chu thlakin, April 1, 2026 atang khan hman tan a ni tawh a ni. He dan thar hian khawpui chhunga bawlhhlawh siam chhuah leh vawmkhawm danahte, a thliar hran (segregation) leh a sawngbawl danahte ruahmanna thar chipchiar takin a rawn siam a. ‘Solid Waste Management Rules, 2026’ hnuaiah hian bawlhhlawhte chu chi li (four categories) ah thliar hran tur a ni a, chungte chu :1) Dry Waste (bawlhhlawh ro) - Plastic, lehkha, thir leh a hman nawn theih thildangte, 2) Wet Waste (bawlhhlawh hnawng) - Chaw eibang leh thlai hnah/kawr (biodegradable), 3) Domestic Hazardous Waste - Hriau, damdawi bur leh battery ang chite 4) Sanitary Waste- Diapers leh sanitary napkins angte a huam a ni. He dan thar hnuaiah hian bawlhhlawh a paihna hmuna paihlote hremna na tak a awm a, sorkar official he dan bawhchhiate hrem tura ruat te pawhin hremna an lekkawh loh chuan anmahni official zawkte pawh hrem an ni dawn a ni.

Mission Urban Drain tlangzarhna inkhawm hi Pu K. Lalthawmmawia, Commissioner & Secretary, UD&PA in a kaihruai a, Pu Vanlalhlana, PWD Minister, Pu Lalthansanga, EF&CC Minister, Dr. Vanlalthlana, ICT Minister, Pu B. Lalchhanzova, IPRP&S Minister, Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar, Tourism Minister, Pu Lalchhuanthanga, Aizawl South-II MLA, Pi Baryl Vanneihsangi, Aizawl South-III MLA, Aizawl Mayor Pu H. Lalremtluanga, Deputy Mayor Pi R. Lalawmpuii, AMC Executive Corporator-te leh AMC Corporator te bakah AMC Commissioner, PHED E-in-C, Aizawl City Local Council Association hruaitute, Media aiawhte, AMC leh UD&PA official-te an tel a, Mission Urban Drain leh Solid Waste Management Rules, 2026 kaltlanga hmalak dan turte zau takin an sawiho nghal a ni.

title: CHIEF MINISTER ATTENDS MIZORAM FISH FARMERS’ MEET
content:
73/2026-2027

Aizawl, 13th May 2026:The Mizoram Fish Farmers’ Meet, organised by the Fisheries Department, was held today at Dawrpui Multipurpose Hall. The programme was attended by Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma, while Fisheries Minister Pu Lalthansanga the guest of honor.

Addressing the gathering, the Chief Minister stated that Mizoram has an estimated 24,000 hectares suitable for fish farming, of which fish ponds have so far been developed in around 6,000 hectares only — about 25 percent of the total potential area.

He noted that one of the major challenges in fish production in Mizoram is the limited number of ponds and inadequate storage facilities. He also pointed out that the State’s fish productivity per hectare remains low.

The Chief Minister stressed that increasing fish productivity from existing ponds should now become a priority, even if new ponds cannot immediately be developed. He emphasised the need for fish farmers to adopt modern technologies and scientific practices in fish farming, including proper pond management, fish health care, and feeding practices, to improve productivity and profitability.

He stated that under the leadership of the Fisheries Minister, the Government is actively working to enhance fish production through various schemes such as the Blue Revolution, Pradhan Mantri Matsya Sampada Yojana (PMMSY), and the Bana Kaih (Handholding) Scheme. He added that preparations and Action Plans have already been made in anticipation of the launch of PMMSY 2.0.

Under the Mizoram Flagship Scheme Bana Kaih, assistance has been extended to 201 beneficiaries for fish pond construction through the CM Special Package, while 14 beneficiaries have been supported through the loan component. During the second phase of the scheme, which resumed from September last year, 27 beneficiaries have already been assisted through the CM Special Package and 5 through the loan component. He informed that applications under the ongoing second phase remain open for eligible project proposals.

The Chief Minister also highlighted that the Government is exploring additional initiatives beyond existing Central Schemes and Bana Kaih support, and assured that viable proposals with proper project details and financial requirements would be seriously considered for implementation.

Earlier, Er. Lalrothanga, Secretary, Fisheries Department, presented a summary of surveys conducted and issues raised by fish farmers. Smt Zonuntluangi, Director, Fisheries, delivered the welcome address, while Pi Zonunthari, Joint Secretary, Fisheries Department, proposed the vote of thanks.

title: CHIEF MINISTER-IN MIZORAM SANGHA KHAWITUTE INTAWHKHAWMNA TELPUI
content:
494/2026-2027

Aizawl the 13th May 2026:Vawiin khan Fisheries Department bultumin Mizorama Sangha khawitute intawhkhawmna (Mizoram Fish Farmers' Meet) Dawrpui Multipurpose Hall-ah buatsaih a ni a. Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma chuan telpuiin Pu Lalthansanga, Fisheries Minister chu khualzahawm a ni.

Thusawiin Pu Lalduhoma chuan, Mizoramah hian Sangha khawi theihna ram hi Hectare 24,000 vel kan nei a. Chung zinga ram hectare 6,000 velah chuan Sangha dil kan nei mek a. Za zela 25 vel chauh a la ni a. Phur za hmun nei chunga phur 25 thar theihna chauh la siam ang kan ni.

Sangha tharchhuah lama Mizoram harsatna langsar chu Dil kan la nei tlem a, kan tharchhuahte dah thatna kan la nei tha tawk lo va. Kan dil neih mekte atanga kan tharchhuah that zawng (Fish Productivity per Hectare) a la hniam bawk a.

Vawiina kan ngaihtuah hmasak tur nia lang chu kan thar hlawk tawk em? tih hi a ni. Sangha dil thar kan laih belh thei rih lo a nih pawhin kan neih chhunte thar hlawktir lamah tan kan la thei a ni.

Sangha dil neituten hlawk zawka kan tharchhuah theih nan tunlai thiamna thar ber ber kan hman ve a ngaiin ka ring a. Sangha hrisel zawk neih dan te, a chaw lama kan hriat tur chi te, Dil enkawl dan dik leh kan hnathawhna lama kan mamawh apiang kan ngaihven a, kan hriat ve zel a tha a. Vawiina kan intawhkhawmnaah hian chutiang lam chu in lo sawiho turah ka ngai a ni.

Sangha tharchhuah tam lama hma kan sawn theih nan kan Minister kaihhruaina hnuaiah thapui kan thawh mek a. Scheme hrang hrang Blue Revolution te, Prandhan Mantri Matsya Sampada Yojana (PMMSY) leh Bana Kaih (Handholding) Scheme hmangtein hma kan la a. PMMSY 2.0 hi kalpui chhunzawm kan beisei avangin a lo chhuah huna kan kalpui ve nghal theih nan Action Plan pawh kan siam a.

Mizoram Flagship Scheme Bana Kaih thawhkhatna CM Special Package atangin Sangha dil siamtu mi 201 te banah kan kai a. Loan Component hmangin mi 14 te banah kan kai bawk a. A thawhhnihna hi nikum September thla aṭang khan kan tan leh a, CM Special Package hmangin mi 27 te kan thawhpui a, Loan component atangin mi 5 te kan thawhpui leh tawh a. Sangha dil kan neih belh chho zel a.

Thawhhnihna hi la kalpui mek a ni a, dilnate pawh hi thehluh theihin kan hawng reng a. Miin thawhpuitlak ruahmanna (Project Proposal) a neih kha chuan kan thawhpui zel mai dawn a ni.

Hma kan lak chin chinah kan thawhpui Sangha dil neituten in thawk tha thawkhat tih kan hria a. In chungah lawmthu ka sawi a ni.

Kan sangha tharchhuahte kan bazarah awlsam taka kan hmuh theih nan Chain Cold Storage Facility kan mamawh a, a tam thei ang ber neih kan tum dawn a ni.

Central Scheme leh Bana Kaih hmanga kan thawh phak bak, hmalakna tur tul si tea hmalak theih dan a awm em? tiin kan Minister leh Department lama kan mithiamten ngaihtuahna an seng mek a. An ruahmannate han duang fel se, a project details te, sum leh pai kan mamawh zat turte han hre chiang hmasa ila. Kan tih theih dawn chuan tihhlawhtlin ngei pawh kan tum dawn nia, a ti.

Pu Lalthansanga, Minister pawhin thusawiin, Fisheries department hi mumal lehzualin kan kal tan a, induhsakna hmanga tanpuina inpek mai thin ang chi tihbo tumin kalphung thar kan siam a. A phute chauhin sangha khawi tanpuina hi dawng se kan duh a ni, a ti.

He intawhkhawmnaah hian Bank lama thawktuten sangha khawitute tana bank loan lak theih dan zirtirna an nei a, farmers ten an harsatna hrang hrang sawichhuahna an nei a, sangha enkawl dan zirhona an nei a. Sangha khawitu hlawhtlingte thusawi leh lawmman semna an nei bawk.

Pi Zonuntluangi, Director, Fisheries chuan kalkawmte lawmna thu a sawi a. Er. Lalrothanga, Secretary, Fisheries Department chuan sangha khawitute harsatna hrang hrang sawite leh survey an neihte khaikhawmna a nei a, Pi Zonunthari, Jt. Secretary, Fisheries chuan lawmthu sawiin inkhawm a khar a ni.

title: Mizoram Science Society-in Mizoram Science Award Dr L.N. Tluanga hnenah a hlan
content:
493/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl:the 13 May 2026:Vawiin khan Mizorama Science NGO upa ber Mizoram Science Society (MSS) chuan Aizawl Hospital- ah, Mizorama a hmasa ber atan Mizoram Science Award chu Dr. L.N. Tluanga, Mission veng hnenah a hlan a ni.

Mizoram Science Award hi mizote zinga science leh a kaihhnawih lama khawtlang leh ram tana hnuhma nei tha te, scientific research lama mi hming tha leh thawhhlawk te hnena hlan thin tura Mizoram Science Society(MSS)-in a duan niin a dawng hmasa ber tur atan Dr. LN Tluanga hi thlan a ni a. He Award hian tangkafai Rs 50,000/- keng telin, Dr. LN Tluanga hi a taksa a chak loh ve deuh tawh avangin Aizawl Hospitalah enkawl mek niin chawimawina Award pawh hi damdawi inah hian MSS hruaitu ten an hlan a ni.

Dr. LN Tluanga hi kum 1933 khan Bukpui khuaah lo piangin, Sialsuk leh Aizawlah te a naupan laiin  lehkha a zir a. BSc hi Scottish church College atangin 1955 khan Mathematics subject-ah Distiction-ah  a passed a. BSc a passed hnu hian Sikulah kum 1 thawkin MSc a zir chhunzawm leh a, a hnu deuh  kum 1974 khan Gauhati University hnuaiah PhD zovin Mizo zinga Mathematics subject-a PhD nei  hmasa ber a ni nghe nghe a. Mizoram sawrkar hnuaia Education Director hmasa ber niin a hnu lamah  pawh Education department hnuaiah vek hian Consultant/Adviser hna a chelh leh bawk a ni.  Science tih hmasawnna kawngah nasa taka thawktu niin Mizoram Science Society pawh hi ama hova  kum 1979-a din a ni nghe nghe a ni.

title: KOLASIB DC HOVIN SOLID WASTE MANAGEMENT RULES 2026 KALPUI DAN TUR SAWIHO A NI
content:
492/2026-2027

Kolasib, 13th May, 2026:Vawiin chawhma dar khan DC Conference Hall, Kolasib-ah Kolasib Deputy Commissioner Pu H. Dolianbuaia hovin Solid Waste Management Rules, 2026 kalpui dan tur leh a kaihhruaina (Road Map/Framework) siam turin thutkhawm a ni. He thutkhawm hi sawrkar lehkha pawimawh in a phut anga koh a ni.

Thutkhawm kaihruaitu DC Pu H. Dolianbuaia chuan, Mizoram puma faina inelnaah Kolasib district chuan pakhatna a nih theih ngei a beisei thu sawiin, hemi a nih theih nan hian theihtawp chhuahin a theih ang angin tangho vek ila a ti a. Tuna bawlhhlawh paih dan kalpui mek chu a tha tawk em, tih leh tihdan dang hmasawnna tur awmte sawiho turin kalkhawmte chu a sawm a ni.

Kalkhawmte chuan ngaihdan leh harsatna awm thinte thawhkhawmin, bawlhhlawh paih dan kalphung a inthlak zin deuh thin thu leh, mipuite hnenah inzirtirna kalpui thin mah se, a hman tak tak dawn veleh ruahmanna dang a lo awm leh thin avangin, mipui ten awlsam leh felfai zawka an zawm theih tur ruahmanna fumfe tak neih a ngaih thu an sawi a. Hemi rual hian bawlhhlawh lakkhawmna motor pawh tuna hman mek ai hian tam zawk awm thei se an duh thu an sawi lang bawk a ni.

SWM Road Map tharin a phut angin, bawlhhlawh sawngbawl leh tifai hna hi District Urban Development Officer (DUDO), PHED leh Block Development Officer (BDO) ten anmahni huamchhungah an vil (supervise) ang a. He ruahmanna thar enchhinna (Pilot Project) hi Bilkhawthlir leh Thingdawl-ah te kalpui nise tiin, project Coordinator atan hian Project Director, Rural Development (RD) ruat a ni.

Solid Waste Management Rules 2026 hi kumin April ni 1 atanga hman tan a ni a, kum 2016-a dan hlui hman thin chu a luahlan a ni. He dan tharah hian DC chu Chairman a ni ang a, bawlhhlawh paih tur te hi chi li (4) a thliar (segregate) ngei ngei tur a ni. He dan thar hlawhtling taka kalpui a nih theih nan mipui zirtirna (IEC) kawngah nasa zawka tan lak a ngai dawn a ni. He dan thar hian faina tluantling neih a nih theih nan bawlhhlawh sawngbawl dan changkang zawk a kawhhmuh a; mipuite hriselna humhalh leh kan vela leilung, tui leh boruak tha lo tur venhim na a dah pawimawh hle. Vawiin thutkhawmna ah hian heng ruahmanna siam tharte leh hmabak la awmte hi hun remchang hmasa berah sawiho leh nise tih a ni bawk.

Solid Waste Management Rules, 2026 kalpui dan tur chungchang a thutkhawmna ah hian Project Director (DRDO), District Urban Development Officer (UD&PA), Executive Engineer (PHED), District Local Administration Officer, DIPRO Kolasib leh Kolasib Town chhunga Village Council aiawhte an tel kim hle.

title: Minister Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar chuan ‘Mizoram Labour Link’ App a tlangzarh
content:
491/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, 13th May, 2026:Vawiin chawhnu khan "Mizoram Labour Link" Mobile App chu Labour, Employment, Skill Development and Entrepreneurship (LESDE) Department changtu Minister Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar chuan LESDE Auditorium, Directorate Office, MINECO- ah a tlangzarh.

Minister Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar chuan khawvel thiamna ṭhangzel banpha tur leh tel ve thei tura Mizoram mipuite tana ṭangkai tur Mizoram Labour Link Mobile App a tlangzarh thei chu lawmawm a ti a. Tunlai khawvel intlansiakna ber, hmasawna min thlentheitu ṭangkai tak ni bawk chu Digital Infrastructure hi a nih thu sawiin, “Mihring thiamna tihpunna chu Digital World-ah a awm a ni”, a ti. Mobile App tlangzarhnaah Press mite leh MJA hruaitute an lo tel thei lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, he app an tlangzarh chhan, a hmangtu tur takten he apps an hman ṭangkai theihna turin a thehdarhna kawngah Press mite hma la turin a sawm a. Hnathawktu hnufual zawkte leh hmun kilkhawra awmten an hriat a, an hman ṭangkai theih nana awareness campaign neih turin a chah bawk a ni.

Mizoram Labour Link Mobile Application hi ni tin inhawhfa thinte (Daily Labourer/Workers) leh a chhawrtu tur (Employer) indawr tawnna tur (Digital Platform) atana duan a ni a. He application in a tum ber chu:

1. Pawnlam mi (middlemen) inrawlhna tih tlem.

2. Hnathawh tur zawnga hmun him lo laia Workers/Labours-te fuankhawmna tih bo.

3. Ni tin inhlawh thinten an thawh hlawh dik tak (fair wages) langtlang taka an hmuh theihna tura duan a ni.

He application hi a hmangtuin awlsam taka an hman theih tura duan a ni a, hna zawngtute leh a chhawrtuten awlsam takin an smartphone kaltlangin direct service an hmu thei dawn a ni.

Mobile Application tih theih thenkhatte:

4. Hna zawnglai (worker) leh a chhawr theitu tur (employer) inziahluh theihna.

5. Hna tarchhuah (job posting) theihna leh dil theihna.

6. SMS leh Push Notification hmanga inhriattir theihna.

7. Hna zawngtu leh hnathawh tur neitu inbiakpawh theihna.

8. Awmna hmuna zir (location based), leh thiamthil bik (skill based) a zira hna zawnna leh tarlanna.

9. Mobile application hmangtu account nemnghehna leh venhimna (user authentication & authorization).

He platform hi mobile application chauh ni lovin, Mizorama nitin inhawhfa thinte leh a chhawrtute indawrtawnna awlsam zawk leh technology-driven labour ecosystem dinna tur lungphum a ni a. He application hi tihchangtlun chhoh zel tura ruahman a ni.

He Link hi ni tina inhlawhfa thinten hna an zawn/hmuh theihna tur leh hamthatna an dawn theih angte an hriat theihna tura duan niin hmun kilkhawr ber bera awmte tan pawha awlsam taka an hman tangkai theih tura duan a ni.

He platform hi employer-te leh hnathawh tur zawngte inkara inzawmna ṭha zawk siam tumna a nih bakah Mizoram sawrkarin digital governance a tihchangtlun lehzualna tur atana hmalakna a ni.

LESDE department  buatsaih Mobile App tlangzarhna programme-ah hian LESDE Director Pu John Ṭanpuia'n technical report pein,  Mobile App hnathawh dan tlangpui a tarlang a. Join Labour Commissioner Pu Vanlalawmpuia chuan lawmthu sawiin a khar a ni.

title: Minister Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar Chuan Zirlai Hlawhtlingte Lawmpuina Hun A Hmanpui
content:
490/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 13th May, 2026:Ephraim Higher Secondary School (EHSS) HSLC leh HSSLC 2026 exam-a hlawhtlingte lawmpuina hun Vanapa Hall-a neihah vawiin khan Minister Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar chu khuallian a ni.

Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar chuan zo nun ze mawi - aia upa zah thiamna vawng nung zel turin zirlaite a fuih a. Khawi hmunah pawh kal se, an thinlungah pi pu chena kan rohlu - zo nun ze mawi, aia upa zahna leh mi dangte nena inzahtawnna vawng nung reng turin a chah a ni.

Tunlai internet leh social media khawvela seilian thalaite an vanneih em em rualin, harsatna tam tak erawh an tawk thei, tih sawiin Minister chuan technology leh social media hmang thiam turin a fuih a. Zirlaite chu an hriselna ngai pawimawha, mahni inthunun theihna nei tlat turin a fuih a ni. Pawl 12 pass thar zirlaite hnenah college nun an hmachhawn turah an zirna ngai pawimawh tur te, an chhungkaw dinhmun leh phak tawk hre reng chunga khawsak thiam turin Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar chuan a fuih bawk.

Pianpun tulzia pawh sawiin Minister chuan India rama nau piang zat fertility rate chu 2.1 a nih laiin Mizoram chu 1.87 chauh a ni a; India ram mipui zawng zawng za zela chhutin Mizoram population chu 0.09% chauh kan nih thu leh kan population hniam lutuk hian Mizo hnam dinhmun a nghawng nasa dawn nia a hriat thu a sawi a. Hemi kawngah hian tunlai thangtharten rilru thar kan put a pawimawh hle a ni, Minister chuan a ti.

Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar chuan Ephraim Higher Secondary School atanga HSLC leh HSSLC pass percentage 100% an nei chu ropui a tih thu a sawi a. Hlawhtlinna chang zirlaite chu lawmpuiin, an kal zelna turah duhsakna a hlan a ni.

Ephraim Higher Secondary School HSLC leh HSSLC 2026 result chu hetiang hi a ni: HSLC-ah zirlai 163 an exam a, 163 ten hlawhtlinna changin pass percentage 100% an nei a, English subject topper Joanna Lalzuimawii an nei bawk. HSSLC Arts stream-ah hian zirlai 99 an exam a, 99 ten hlawhtlinna changin pass percentage 100% an nei a ni.

Vawiin hunah hian EHSS Principal Pu MS Dawngliana chuan khuallian te, mikhual sawmte leh zirlai hlawhtlingte a lo lawm a. School-in 100% pass percentage an neih theihnaah zirtirtute, nu leh pate leh zirlaite thawhhona rah a ni tiin, lawmawm a tih thu a sawi bawk.

He hunah hian hlawhtlinna chang zirlaite hnenah Incentive Cash Award sem a ni a. EHSS Lecturer Pu Vanlalengmawia’n lawmthu sawiin hun a khar a ni.

title: Constitution of Special Cell at Lawngtlai District
content:
487/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 13th May 2026:In accordance with the direction of the Hon'ble Supreme Court of India at Para 4 of the Order dated 05.05.2026 in regards to Solid Waste Management Rules, 2026. The Deputy Commissioner has Constituted Special Cell at Lawngtlai District.

NOTIFICATION

No.A.48012/6/2026-DC(LTI): In accordance with the direction of the Hon'ble Supreme Court of India at Para 4 of the Order dated 05.05.2026 in regards to Solid Waste Management Rules, 2026. The Deputy Commissioner is pleased to Constitute Special Cell at Lawngtlai District as indicated below with the following composition with immediate effect and until further orders.

Special Cell at Lawngtlai District

Chairman : Additional DC

Members : i. Project Director, DRDO

ii. Executive Engineer, PHED

iii. District Project Officer, UD&PA Deputy

iv. Representative of MPCB (to be deputed by MPCB)

The Special Cell shall be responsible to not only oversee the implementation of the Solid Waste Management Rules, 2026 but in given circumstances to issue direction for the stoppage of water / electricity to bulk waste generators of solid waste who disobey the direction or disregards the Rules.

Sd/-DONNY LALRUATSANGADeputy Commissioner,Lawngtlai District, Lawngtlai

title: RD & AD MINISTER PROF. LALNILAWMA INAUGURATES DISTRICT PANCHAYAT RESOURCE CENTRE AT LAWNGTLAI
content:
72/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 13 May 2026:Minister for Rural Development & Administration, Prof. Lalnilawma today inaugurated the “District Panchayat Resource Centre” (DPRC) at Lawngtlai. Adviser to the Chief Minister and MLA of Lawngtlai East, Dr. Lorrain Lalpekliana Chinzah, attended the programme as the guest of honour.

Speaking at the inauguration, Prof. Lalnilawma expressed happiness over the opening of the DPRC, which is intended for the benefit of Village Councils and the people of Lawngtlai District. He stated that the centre would be especially useful for Village Councils from remote areas by providing accommodation and other facilities. He urged all concerned to maintain and utilise the centre responsibly and with a sense of ownership.

The Minister highlighted that the DPRC would serve as an important training centre for Village Council members, enabling them to enhance their administrative capabilities and contribute more effectively towards the development of society and the state. He also mentioned that the government is seriously considering the construction of a guest house in Aizawl for Village Councils across Mizoram.

Prof. Lalnilawma stressed the importance of cooperation among Village Councils and encouraged them to work selflessly for the welfare and progress of their communities. He further called for renewed efforts in maintaining cleanliness and proper waste management, urging Village Councils to take greater responsibility in these areas. He also encouraged Village Councils to explore ways to generate their own resources and work with integrity and dedication in all spheres of administration.

During the programme, Prof. Lalnilawma and Dr. Lorrain Lalpekliana Chinzah also distributed computer sets to 15 Village Councils.

In his address, Dr. Lorrain Lalpekliana Chinzah described the inauguration of the DPRC as a significant achievement for Lawngtlai District under the government’s developmental initiatives. He urged Village Councils to utilise the facility effectively for growth and development while continuing to serve society with sincerity and commitment beyond political affiliations.

Additional Secretary of RD & AD, Shri V. Lalengmawia, also addressed the gathering and encouraged Village Council leaders to continue contributing wholeheartedly not only to their localities but also to the state and the nation. Director of the Directorate of Local Administration, RD & AD, Dr. Lalngura Tlau, stated that the DPRC would become an important institution for training and empowering Village Councils and urged all stakeholders to preserve and maintain it properly.

Presenting the technical report, Er. Lalrinmawia, Executive Engineer, RD & AD, informed that the District Panchayat Resource Centre was constructed under the Rashtriya Gram Swaraj Abhiyan scheme. He said that ₹1 crore each was spent on the construction of the office building and hostel building. The office building consists of a conference room, office room, and meeting room, while the hostel building contains seven bedrooms with two beds each, along with a kitchen and chowkidar quarters. The project was funded by the Ministry of Panchayati Raj, Government of India, and executed by Shri Biakliana & Sons, Sikulpuikawn, Aizawl.

The inaugural programme was chaired by Shri  H. Zonunmawia, PD (DRDO), and attended by Village Council members from across Lawngtlai District, NGOs, and Heads of Departments under the Government of Mizoram. The programme concluded with a vote of thanks delivered by Shri  S.T. Lalhmingmawia, JD (P), Directorate of LA, RD & AD.

title: RD & AD MINISTER PROF. LALNILAWMA' N  LAWNGTLAIAH DISTRICT PANCHAYAT RESOURCE CENTRE - HAWNG
content:
486/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 13th May 2026:Vawiin khan Rural Development & Administration Department Minister Prof. Lalnilawma chuan khuallian niin ' Lawngtlai District Panchayat Resource Centre ' a hawng a. Dr. Lorrain Lalpekliana Chinzah Adviser to Chief Minister leh Lawngtlai East bialtu MLA nibawk chuan khualzahawm niin a hmanpui.

Prof. Lalnilawma chuan Lawngtlai District- chhunga Village Council- te leh a mamawhtuten tangkai taka an hman tura lawm taka 'District Panchayat Resource Centre' a hawn thu a sawi a. DPRC - chhawr tangkai turin VC - te an pawimawh hle a, a bik takin Lawngtlai khawpawn lam VC - te tan thlenna leh zan riahna tur tha tak a ni dawn tih sawiin, neitu thinlungpua hmangaih leh duat taka enkawl turin a fuih a. Sawrkar kaltlanga khawtlang enkawltu VC - ten thiamna sang zawk nei tura an ' Training' na tur hmun a nih angin, ram leh hnam tana mi tangkai zawk an chhuah zel a beisei thu a sawi a. Minister chuan sawrkarin VC- te hmakhua a ngai em em a, Mizoram chhunga VC - te tan Aizawlah Khualbuk sak a tul hle tih tarlangin, hemi atan hian ngaihtuahna pawh sen mek a nih thu a tarlang a ni.

Khuallian chuan VC - te inkarah thawhhona tha tak a awm a tul hle tih a sawi a. Khawtlang enkawl kawngah mawhphurtu ber an nih angin, mahni hmasialna dah thaa khawtlang hmasawnna ngaipawimawh ber chunga thawk turin a fuih a. Faina leh thianghlimna kawngah tan lak thar a tul hle tih tarlangin, a bik takin bawlhlawh sawngbawl kawngah mawhphurhna la thar ngam turin VC - te a chah a. VC - ten mahnia thawhchhuah neih ve a tul hle a, hemi kawngah pawh hian ngaihtuahna siam thiam turin a chah a ni. Minister chuan VC - te hnathawh kawng hrang hrangah rintlak leh chhuanawm taka thawh a pawimawh hle tih sawiin, hna tha thawk tura mahni intiam ngam turin a fuih a. VC- te chu kawng enkima a bul thuta hnathawktute an nih thu sawiin, sawrkar department hrang hrangte thawhpui thiam tura chahin, Prof. Lalnilawma chuan khawtlang, ram leh hnam hmasawnna turah sawrkar thawhpui tlat turin a sawm nghal bawk.

Prof. Lalnilawma leh Dr. Lorrain Lalpekliana Chinzah te hian VC - 15 te hnenah Computer set- an hlan nghal bawk a ni.

Khualzahawm Dr. Lorrain Lalpekliana Chinzah chuan sawrkar hmalakna zara Lawngtlai District- tana DPRC hawn a ni chu lawmawm a tih thu a tarlang a. VC - te chu a hmangtangkaitu ber an nih dawn angin, neitu thinlungpu a,hmasawnna atana chhawr theih turin a fuih a. VC Member- te chu khawtlang enkawltu ber leh sawrkar kut leh ke pawimawh tak an nih hre renga ram leh hnam tana theihtawp chhuah zel turin a chah a. Khawtlangin hmasawnna a neih turah party- bik sawi a thianglo tih tarlangin, dikna leh rinawmna nena thawk tlat turin a fuih a. Dr. Lorrain Lalpekliana Chinzah chuan Lawngtlai District chhunga Village Council zawng zawngte khawtlang leh ram tana thawhpuiah a sawm nghal a ni.

Pu V. Lalengmawia, Additional Secretary, RD & AD chuan thu sawiin, VC- te chu khawtlang hruaitu an nihna hriaa, mahni khawtlang bakah ram leh hnam tana theihtawp chhuah chhunzawm zel turin a fuih a ni. Dr. Lalngura Tlau, Director, Dte. of LA,RD&AD pawhin thutawi sawiin, VC leh vantlang mipuiten tangkai tak hmang turin duhsakna a hlan a. DPRC chu Lawngtlai District- chhunga VC - te training - na hmun tur niin, VC- te thuamchakin, khawtlangah hmasawnna thlentu a nih ngei dawn thu tarlangin, duat leh hmangaih taka enkawl turin a chah nghal a ni.

Er. Lalrinmawia, EE, RD&AD chuan ' Technical Report' pein District Panchayat Resource Centre - chu Rashtriya Gram Swaraj Abhiyan hnauaia sak niin, Office Building leh Hostel Building sak nan hian cheng nuai 100 ve ve sen ral a ni a ti, a. Office Building - ah hian Conference Room - 1, Office Room- 1, Meeting Room- 1, a awm a. Hostel Building ah hian Bedroom - 7 awmin khum - 2 theuh a awm a, Choka/ Chawkidar quarters - a awm bawk a ni. A sakna sum hi Ministry of Panchayati Raj atanga hmuh niin, Contractor chu Pu Biakliana & Sons, Sikulpuikawn, Aizawl an ni.

District Panchayat Resource Centre- hawnna inkhawm hi  Pu H. Zonunmaiwa PD (DRDO) chuan kaihhruaiin Lawngtlai District- chhunga  Village Council Member- te, NGOs leh Mizoram sawrkar hnuaia Head of Department - te an telkim tha hle a, Pu S.T. Lalhmingmawia, JD (P)  Dte. of LA,RD&AD chuan lawmthu sawiin hun a khar.
